prose:
Fukui reactivity indices (electrophilic, nucleophilic, and radical) for nitrobenzene were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`, density-fit) in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the user-supplied file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`.
